name: where_to_buy_7_pages_where-to-buy

missing_or_weak.observation: Page returns 404 (canonical: /404) — standard Shopify 'where-to-buy' URL is broken for Beardbrand

purchase_path_notes: Beardbrand appears to be DTC-only (direct-to-consumer) — the where-to-buy page returning 404 suggests no retail distribution page exists or it was never published at this standard URL.
